title: Add RandomErasing cutout to affine CNN
methodology: Added a single cutout-style augmentation step with torchvision RandomErasing after normalization in the existing affine-augmented, label-smoothed, warmup-cosine CNN pipeline. No optimizer, model, dataset, or budget changes were made.
motivation: Research brief dated 2026-03-28 flagged data augmentation as a promising unexplored direction beyond exp-031, so this tested whether cutout-style masking could improve the current best affine CNN recipe.
